title: BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: SISKIYOU COMMUNITY HEALTH CLINIC GRANTS PASS BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides behavioral health services, which include treatment for depression, loss, trauma, anxiety, phobia, stress, family problems, substance use disorder or addiction, and other behavioral or psychiatric health problems. Services include individual, family, and group counseling, psychotherapy, medication evaluation and management, psychiatric consultation, psychological testing, and assistance accessing community resources. 1701 NW Hawthorne Avenue Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Age 10 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 472-4777 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 472-4777 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment. Limited walk-ins accepted. FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, and most private insurances. Sliding scale fees available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Josephine County Services: Family Counseling Group Counseling Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Psychiatric Medication Services Substance Use Disorder Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES OREGON OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - HEALTH CARE SERVICES OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - WALK-IN CLINIC SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL CARE SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
